tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List upcoming Google Calendar events. Returns {ok: true, data: {events: [{id, summary, start, end, attendees, location, description, html_link}]}}.

time_min.description: Start of time range, ISO 8601 (default: now)

time_max.description: End of time range, ISO 8601 (default: now + 7 days)

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default: 25)

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get a single Google Calendar event by ID. Returns {ok: true, data: {event: {...}}} with the full event object.

tools.name: capture_gtd
tools.description: Capture a GTD record (task, idea, or parking_lot). Returns {ok: true, data: {id, record_type}} on success.

record.description: The assembled GTD record. Must include record_type and required fields for that type.

tools.name: query_tasks
tools.description: Query GTD tasks with optional filters. Returns {ok: true, data: {items, total_count, truncated}}.

due_date_before.description: Return tasks with due_date <= this ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)

due_date_after.description: Return tasks with due_date >= this ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)

has_waiting_for.description: true: only tasks with waiting_for set; false: only tasks without

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default: 10; max: 25)

tools.name: query_ideas
tools.description: Query GTD ideas. Returns {ok: true, data: {items, total_count, truncated}}.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default: 10; max: 25)

tools.name: query_parking_lot
tools.description: Query GTD parking lot items. Returns {ok: true, data: {items, total_count, truncated}}.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default: 10; max: 25)

tools.name: review_gtd
tools.description: Run a structured GTD review scan. Returns {ok: true, data: {items, total_count, truncated, review_available, note}}. review_available is false until review semantics are fully designed.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default: 10; max: 25)

tools.name: delegation
tools.description: Query waiting-for tasks grouped by person. Returns {ok: true, data: {groups: [{person, count, items}], total_items, truncated}}.

person.description: Filter to a specific person's waiting-for items (omit for all persons)

limit.description: Maximum items per person group (default: 10; max: 25)
